meta.title: The Dark Factory — Feature Timeline
meta.subtitle: How an autonomous code factory taught itself to refine, gate, ship, and self-heal
meta.scope_rule: Capabilities of the autonomous factory & scheduler itself (audience: the loop / operators). MarketHawk trading-app features live in a separate timeline. Tie-breaker: in-pipeline gate wiring = Dark Factory; the data-quality-gate as a product feature = MarketHawk.
excluded_borderline: #491 Data Quality Trust Gate epic (incl. #501 survivorship gate) — app feature → MarketHawk timeline
#483 Signal Replay Engine epic — app backtest feature → MarketHawk timeline (only pass^k bench harness #335 counts as factory)
#258/#259 app-container non-root, #88/#97 app CI/pre-commit — app-side, the factory merely relies on them

eras.name: Genesis
eras.blurb: The whole factory lands in one burst — spec, DAG, sandbox image, preview stacks.

eras.name: Becoming Autonomous
eras.blurb: Board automation, OAuth/Max billing, the backlog scheduler, and the refinement front-end give it a will of its own.

eras.name: Observability & Resilience
eras.blurb: It learns to report on itself and stop shipping broken work — cost reports, Seq logs, red-CI gating, image publishing, memory.

eras.name: Gate & Memory Build-out
eras.blurb: The richest era — conformance, scope, code-review, blast-radius & Trivy gates, codeindex/repowise, the scorecard, replay benchmark, and the failure-to-eval flywheel. Epics #262 and #340.

eras.name: Self-Governing Autopilot
eras.blurb: The factory dispatches and unblocks itself — epic autopilot, broaden-reach, green-PR rescue, and autonomous main-red recovery. Epic #548.

epics.name: Harden the self-improvement loop
epics.theme: Stop the factory poisoning itself — memory hygiene, scope-enforcement accuracy, DAG trigger-rule guards.

epics.name: Measurement & hardening
epics.theme: Make the factory measurable and gated — scorecard, run records, baseline-green gate, layered gate seam, replay benchmark, flywheel, dispatch ceiling, tested core, single config.

epics.name: Platform: maintenance, telemetry & autopilot
epics.theme: Ongoing upkeep plus the autopilot / auto-recovery push.

features.title: Founding design spec
features.one_line: Wrote the founding spec: autonomous development in a Docker sandbox with per-issue preview environments.

features.title: Archon DAG workflow
features.one_line: The Archon DAG that drives autonomous development end-to-end, with implement and validate phases.

features.title: Sandbox image + entrypoint lifecycle
features.one_line: Built the dev-toolchain sandbox image and the entrypoint.sh lifecycle dispatch.

features.title: Per-issue preview stacks
features.one_line: Per-issue preview compose template + representative seed dataset for live verification.

features.title: Auto-post run report to issue
features.one_line: Factory posts its run report back to the originating GitHub issue.

features.title: Backlog ingestion + dry-run pipeline
features.one_line: Wired the GitHub backlog into the pipeline and proved it end-to-end with a dry run.

features.title: Fetch PR review comments node
features.one_line: fetch-issue node ingests PR review comments so the factory acts on review feedback.

features.title: Board automation + OAuth/Max billing
features.one_line: Project-board automation, OAuth auth (Claude Max session billing), and continue-mode feedback.

features.title: Epic → sub-issue resolution
features.one_line: Epics are decomposed into individual sub-issues instead of one monolithic run.

features.title: Backlog scheduler
features.one_line: Kanban flow-controller: polling priority waterfall, board-state reads, WIP limits and dependency checks.

features.title: Refinement / SDD pipeline
features.one_line: Multi-agent refine + plan front-end auto-refines raw backlog issues before implementation.

features.title: DOCUMENT phase
features.one_line: Implement stage gains a DOCUMENT phase so changes are documented as part of the run.

features.title: Plan-pending-review gate + architect dialogue
features.one_line: Plans pause for review and the architect Q&A is surfaced in issue comments.

features.title: One-container concurrency cap
features.one_line: Hard-limited the factory to a single running container at a time.

features.title: Per-run token cost reporting
features.one_line: Each run posts a token/cost report comment to its GitHub issue.

features.title: GELF container logs → Seq
features.one_line: Ship factory container logs to Seq via GELF for centralized post-mortems.

features.title: Red-CI tickets gated to Blocked
features.one_line: In-review tickets with red CI are automatically moved to Blocked.

features.title: Collision-free preview ports
features.one_line: Dynamic non-colliding preview ports so parallel previews coexist.

features.title: GHCR image publish + deploy
features.one_line: CI publishes baked factory/app images to GHCR and adds deploy workflows.

features.title: Agent self-improvement memory
features.one_line: implement/refine/plan read lessons at load and write new ones post-run.

features.title: Scheduler back-off + retry guards
features.one_line: Bounded retries with reset so stuck tickets back off instead of looping.

features.title: Spec-conformance verification gate
features.one_line: Plan-vs-spec and code-vs-spec fidelity checks at the plan and code stages.

features.title: Scheduler circuit-breaker
features.one_line: Circuit-breaker stops infinite retry loops in the scheduler.

features.title: Codeindex integration
features.one_line: Symbol index + dependency graph wired in for lookup/impact before edits.

features.title: Repowise health pilot
features.one_line: Adopted repowise for code-health scoring and hotspot queries.

features.title: Scope-enforcement gate
features.one_line: Conformance gate flags and excises out-of-scope diffs so PRs stay tight.

features.title: Auto-resolve merge conflicts
features.one_line: Factory auto-detects and resolves merge conflicts on its in-review PRs.

features.title: Direct-to-PR mode
features.one_line: Opt-in single-gate autonomous flow for low-risk tickets.

features.title: Interactive pipeline production report
features.one_line: Interactive Dark Factory metrics/production dashboard (the pipeline report).

features.title: Dedicated code-review gate
features.one_line: A distinct AI code-review DAG node with its own reviewer prompt and config block.

features.title: docker-socket-proxy sidecar
features.one_line: Routed factory + scheduler Docker access through a hardened socket-proxy; non-root user.

features.title: Memory hygiene revamp
features.one_line: Made factory memory less eager — stop persisting unverified lessons (epic #262).

features.title: OR-join trigger-rule guard
features.one_line: Lint/guard OR-join trigger_rule on branch-join DAG nodes (epic #262).

features.title: Configurable WIP limit
features.one_line: Concurrent-run ceiling is configurable; entrypoint mutex honors FACTORY_WIP_LIMIT.

features.title: Factory scorecard dashboard
features.one_line: Merge-rate triad, rework rate, churn, success-by-size (epic #340).

features.title: Baseline-green / main-red sentinel
features.one_line: Smoke origin/main green before any run; a main-red sentinel pauses dispatch (epic #340).

features.title: Structured run record
features.one_line: One structured per-run record of every stage verdict → Seq + runs.jsonl (epic #340).

features.title: Layered gate + blast-radius hard gate
features.one_line: gate_lib.sh shared library, judge calibration, and a Phase-0 blast-radius human gate (epic #340).

features.title: Size/type-aware dispatch ceiling
features.one_line: Scheduler caps concurrent dispatch by ticket size/type (epic #340).

features.title: Replay benchmark (pass^k)
features.one_line: pass^k replay of closed issues — a regression gate for prompt/DAG/threshold changes (epic #340).

features.title: Failure-to-eval flywheel
features.one_line: On circuit-break the factory writes a post-mortem eval record feeding self-improvement (epic #340).

features.title: config.yaml single source of policy
features.one_line: Consolidated dispatch ceilings + gate blocks into one config.yaml (epic #340).

features.title: Trivy blocking security gate
features.one_line: CI image scan blocks on HIGH/CRITICAL CVEs plus a password min-length policy.

features.title: Tested factory core extracted
features.one_line: Pulled the factory core out of entrypoint/scheduler bash into testable code (epic #340).

features.title: Preview-up on remote BuildKit
features.one_line: Rebuilt preview-up on a remote BuildKit builder + one-shot migrate service, fixing the socket-proxy 403.

features.title: Revise-advisory DAG node
features.one_line: Factory auto-addresses advisory code-review findings via a new DAG node.

features.title: Factory pytest suite in CI
features.one_line: The factory's own pytest suite runs in CI (epic #340).

features.title: Scheduler board pagination
features.one_line: Paginate the project board so the scheduler sees all items, not just the first page.

features.title: Epic autopilot
features.one_line: Scheduler self-unlocks the next epic ticket — bounded and gated by an Opus review (epic #548).

features.title: Autopilot broaden-reach
features.one_line: Autopilot drains the backlog and starts the next epic when work is starved (epic #548).

features.title: Rescue green-PR Blocked tickets
features.one_line: Priority-0.6 rescue pass promotes circuit-broken tickets whose PR is already green to In review.

features.title: Main-red autonomous recovery
features.one_line: Autonomous pipeline recovery auto-fixes a red main (ships behind MAIN_RED_AUTOFIX_ENABLED) (epic #548).

features.title: Python 3.14 dependency unblock
features.one_line: Bumped the scientific stack to cp314 wheels to unblock every refine/implement run.

features.title: Append-only memory guard
features.one_line: Memory writes can no longer delete valid entries (epic #548).

scars.title: OR-join trigger_rule self-skip
scars.one_line: Branch-merge nodes silently skipped when a sibling skipped; forced none_failed_min_one_success + a structural lint guard.

scars.title: E2BIG bash-node inlining
scars.one_line: Archon inlined node output into a bash argv; fixed by reading node outputs from artifact files.

scars.title: classify-preview silent work-discard
scars.one_line: An unparseable when: fail-closed-skipped, letting implement exit 0 and discard work; made it fail loudly instead.

scars.title: compose duplicate-key regression
scars.one_line: Two factory PRs each adding the same compose key produced an unparseable duplicate volumes: on main.

scars.title: Re-merged a settled migration
scars.one_line: Factory re-introduced schema drift a migration had already fixed; restored the orphaned regime migration.

scars.title: BuildKit 403 through socket-proxy
scars.one_line: preview-up died on every implement; resolved with remote BuildKit + migrate service.

scars.title: Scheduler strands off-board deps
scars.one_line: dependencies_met() stranded tickets whose dependency was closed but off-board.

scars.title: False main-red latch
scars.one_line: Smoke-gate import check missing REDIS_PASSWORD falsely latched main-red and paused all dispatch.

scars.title: Python 3.14 dep break
scars.one_line: Base-image bump made scipy source-build with no cp314 wheel, killing every run at pip install.

scars.title: Memory-write data loss
scars.one_line: Memory writes could delete valid entries; added an append-only guard.

in_flight.title: Factory-image vendored-tooling CVEs
in_flight.one_line: Patch CVEs in the factory image's vendored tooling (Trivy advisory).

in_flight.title: Hermes Agent patterns
in_flight.one_line: Adopt persistent-daemon + profiling patterns from the Hermes Agent design.

in_flight.title: Main-red autofix follow-ups
in_flight.one_line: Dispatch guard, observability & scope hardening for the main-red auto-fixer.

in_flight.title: Session-window-aware backoff
in_flight.one_line: Stop circuit-breaking tickets when the Max session window is exhausted.
